items.br: Extrai os tipos de relacionamento entre fornecedores e a organização (spend authorized, supplier, prospective). Permite classificação e segmentação da base por natureza do relacionamento.
items.en: Extracts relationship types between suppliers and the organization (spend authorized, supplier, prospective). Enables classification and segmentation of the supplier base by relationship nature.
items.es: Extrae los tipos de relación entre proveedores y la organización (spend authorized, supplier, prospective). Permite clasificación y segmentación de la base por naturaleza de la relación.
